sections.paragraph:
μᾶλλον [comp. of the adv. μάλα ‘exceedingly’] adv. marker

—1. of increase or additive in some aspect of activity, situation, or condition, freq. qualified w. πολλῷ or πόσῳ (much) more, Mt 6:26, 30; 7:11; Lk 12:24; J 3:19; Ro 11:12; 1 Cor 14:18; μᾶλλον ϰαὶ μᾶλλον more and more Phil 1:9; all the more, still more Mk 10:48; Lk 5:15; 12:28; Ac 5:14; 1 Cor 7:21; 12:22; 2 Cor 7:7, 13; Phil 2:12; 1 Ti 6:2; Hb 12:9, 25.

—2. of a change in procedure or circumstance involving an alternative

—a. with focus on increase in consideration rather Mt 10:6; 25:9; 27:24; Mk 15:11; Ro 8:34; 14:13; 1 Cor 7:21; 2 Cor 12:9; Eph 5:4.

—b. w. focus on substitute aspect instead J 3:19; Ac 4:19; 1 Cor 5:2; Eph 4:28; Phlm 9; Hb 11:25; 12:13.
